page_title: Account Specialist (TikTok Shop & Amazon) - Day Shift, Remote - RocketAMS - Application

detector_only: are you a filipino citizen currently residing in the philippines and able to work as an independent contractor?
this role requires working with aest timezone (7am - 4pm pht) and managing tasks independently. are you comfortable with this?
do you have reliable internet, power source and a suitable laptop or computer for remote work?
do you have 1+ years of experience with account management within amazon seller or vendor central?
do you have experience with building out budgets, forecasts, financial modelling, inventory management tools using excel or google sheets?
do you have hands-on experience managing tiktok shop (seller center, affiliate program, fbt inbound, gmv max, vouchers).
do you have the ability to manage multiple client accounts independently and meet deadlines.

ai.notes: The HTML excerpt is truncated, so additional fields (like resume upload, LinkedIn, or custom questions) that likely exist further down the form are missing.
